description: Pretty pastel palette for the teen diva - this pair of sandals from enroute for Teens features fashion forward styling with comfy, plush padding. Wear this with any off-duty ensemble, colour block it or colour match it, you can't go wrong! Upper Thong style upper with the ankle strap looping through it Heel cup Buckle detail on the ankle strap Padded footbed with perforation details Outsole TPU textured outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
